name: yamark
description: Format YAML, Markdown, and marked embedded Markdown with yamark.

yamark.executable.description: Path to the yamark executable when yamark.useBundledExecutable is false.

yamark.useBundledExecutable.description: Use the yamark executable bundled in this extension under bin/<platform>-<arch>/.

yamark.enabledFileExtensions.description: File extensions yamark should format. Add .rmd, .r, or .py to opt into those files.

yamark.extraArguments.description: Additional arguments passed after `yamark format` and before `--stdin-file-path`.

yamark.runNextFormatter.description: Run yamark.nextFormatterExecutable after Yamark when that argv is configured. Override per language inside [lang] settings.

yamark.nextFormatterExecutable.description: Optional command-line argv for a stdin/stdout formatter that runs on Yamark's output when yamark.runNextFormatter is true. The first element is the executable and the remaining elements are arguments. Supports ${file}, ${fileDirname}, ${exe}, and ${extension:publisher.name} placeholders.
